intent: 2BR / 1 bath — door-host override variant of the 12x12 ncp brief. The common T&B's door moves from its default great_room (south) wall onto the kitchen (east) wall via door_host, consolidating door traffic on the kitchen aisle that already serves the dirty-kitchen back door. The bath's south wall stays solid — the great_room gains furnishable wall + the floor in front of it. The wet_core plumbing wall keeps ≥1.2 m of solid run beside the door (min_solid_wall_m guard). Expected validator note: bath_door_into_kitchen soft warning.
must_haves: bath door consolidated on the kitchen aisle
